title: Just Grenades
description: A tiny, but explosive, mod which adds grenades to Minecraft.
body:
# JustGrenades

A tiny, but explosive, Minecraft mod.

This mod adds a few types of craftable grenades to Minecraft.

### Normal Grenade
Creates an sizeable explosion wherever it lands.
![recipe.png](https://github.com/telecter/JustGrenades/raw/master/recipe.png)

### Smoke Grenade
Creates a cloud of smoke and temporarily blinds anyone in the vicinity of wherever it lands.
![recipe_smoke.png](https://github.com/telecter/JustGrenades/raw/master/recipe_smoke.png)
